textByHash.201926b1c9a1f6e074cd1581d6745e0add9ebe59: It's just 2 gold pieces! Want to go?
textByHash.252f464e085ce13a8671fa428e503549fe22e6a5: You don't even have 2 gold coins, humans!
textByHash.6c26d983482563386a7fe6e349e1dd5e601fe00b: You mean to the city of Keldagrim?
textByHash.80aafbd60f6fcf309ef348d0ef87e39215d36c4e: You don't even have 2 gold coins, human!
textByHash.821ba27f4c71e91f09b562d24543aa23988eca65: Here, let me just relieve you of that one coin you have there and I'll take you across.
textByHash.a2f8bb056ec1f12f9919d7ace39c5405c9b184ef: Hmm. I suppose I could make an exception for you this time.
textByHash.ab4e20c8d96b2eab64e744008ddb1ad2a9443ffd: But talk to my friend here, he sometimes goes to the city in his ship.
textByHash.b4d759d8cb2a64c3ce60f5829a6f13bae00375d3: [laugh], you understand us dwarves well, human!
textByHash.b9da0fc19aa751ed8cec895952d66b7a8f831333: Across the river, across the river! It's just a short ride!
textByHash.cb7fde5797b6c8e93320e820ade7b632589146d8: Want to cross the river? It's just 2 gold pieces!
textByHash.d0c002c2e43ffc607ca4d6fa63858b81ba5e612f: Oh, we wouldn't want that to happen. Come along, you can go for free this time.
textByHash.e88ed155f592b6dd405b281dae419a97bda49aba: Sorry, I'm just a simple ferryman, I only go across.
